name: GitHub Actions CI/CD
description: Production GitHub Actions workflow for Node.js. Includes npm caching (cuts install from 60s to 5s), parallel test and lint jobs, type checking, and deploy-to-Vercel/Railway on merge to main.

steps.description: Create CI workflow: trigger on PR and push to main, runs on ubuntu-latest
Add npm cache step using actions/cache with cache key on package-lock.json hash
Add parallel jobs: typecheck, lint, test (with coverage upload), build
Create deploy workflow triggered on push to main: runs tests then deploys to Vercel
Add weekly security scan: npm audit, CodeQL analysis, Dependabot alerts
